raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Mobilehome parks are a key source of affordable housing in communities.",
    "Residents of mobilehome parks deserve a safe avenue to buy, sell, and live comfortably.",
    "Interference with the right to sell one's home is illegal everywhere in California except in a mobilehome park.",
    "AB 456 would prohibit mobilehome park management from requiring onerous repairs or improvements before selling.",
    "AB 456 would require management to provide homeowners with a written summary of repairs or improvements to the exterior of the mobilehome within fifteen days of a request.",
    "AB 806 would allow mobilehome park residents to install cooling devices in their homes.",
    "AB 806 would require the establishment of cooling centers within mobilehome parks to assist vulnerable residents during heat events."
  ]
}
```
